Title: User logs in successfully
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to login using valid credentials

Title: User views product details
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps: 1. User requests to view product details

Title: User adds product to cart
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps: 1. User selects product to add to cart
Expected Result: Product is added to the cart

Title: User removes product from cart
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists in cart
Test Steps: 1. User selects product to remove from cart
Expected Result: Product is removed from the cart

Title: Admin logs in successfully
Test Steps: 1. Admin attempts to login using valid credentials

Title: Admin updates product details
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Steps:
1. Admin selects product to update
2. Admin enters new description
3. Admin submits update request

Title: User adds non-existent product to cart
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to add non-existent product to cart
Expected Result: Error message indicating product does not exist

Title: User removes non-existent product from cart
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to remove non-existent product from cart
Expected Result: Error message indicating product does not exist in cart

Title: Admin updates non-existent product details
Test Steps: 1. Admin attempts to update non-existent product
Expected Result: Error message indicating product does not exist

Title: Admin updates product with empty description
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Steps: 1. Admin attempts to update product with empty description
Expected Result: Error message indicating description cannot be empty

Title: Admin updates product with valid description
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Steps: 1. Admin updates product with valid description

Title: Admin updates product with special characters in description
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Steps: 1. Admin updates product with special characters in description

Title: Admin updates product with very long description
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Data: name="Laptop", newDescription="A very long description that exceeds the maximum allowed length"
Test Steps: 1. Admin updates product with very long description
Expected Result: Error message indicating description exceeds maximum length

Title: Admin updates product with valid price
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Steps: 1. Admin updates product with valid price

Title: Admin updates product with negative price
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Steps: 1. Admin updates product with negative price
Expected Result: Error message indicating price cannot be negative

Title: Admin updates product with zero price
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Steps: 1. Admin updates product with zero price
Expected Result: Error message indicating price cannot be zero
